# claude Provider

Manage Claude Managed Agents resources: agents, environments, scheduled deployments, vaults and credentials, and memory stores.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    claude = {
      source = "madewithlove/claude-managed-agents"
    }
  }
}

provider "claude" {
  # api_key defaults to the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable.
  # api_key = "sk-ant-..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `anthropic_version` (String) Value for the `anthropic-version` header. Defaults to `2023-06-01`.
- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Claude API key. Falls back to the `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` environment variable.
- `base_url` (String) API base URL. Falls back to `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL`, then `https://api.anthropic.com`.
